channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Bethesda celebrates Fallout Day with a host of announcements, including a Fallout 4 Anniversary Edition and Nintendo Switch 2 Edition, a native Fallout 76 release for PS5 and Xbox Series X, and more
item.description: Bethesda celebrates Fallout Day with a slew of announcements that include a Fallout 4 Anniversary Edition, Fallout 76 for current-gen consoles, and more.
item.dc:creator: Demi Williams, TechRadar

item.title: Google’s Quantum chip claims 13,000x speed advantage over supercomputers
item.description: Google Quantum AI has demonstrated what it describes as a verifiable quantum advantage — running a new algorithm on quantum hardware that outperforms classical supercomputers by a factor of 13,000.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How to use keyed services in ASP.NET Core
item.description: Dependency injection (also known as DI) is a design pattern in which the dependent types of a class are injected (passed to it by another class or object) rather than created directly, thereby facilitating loose coupling and promoting easier testing and maintenance. In ASP.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Inside Google’s multi-architecture revolution: Axion Arm joins x86 in production clusters
item.description: While x86 has been dominant for decades, a new migration project at Google represents a significant shift to more mixed architectures.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Reddit sues Perplexity and others for allegedly scraping millions of user comments
item.description: Social media platform Reddit sued the artificial intelligence company Perplexity AI and three other entities on Wednesday, alleging their involvement in an “industrial-scale, unlawful” economy to “scrape” the comments of millions of Reddit users for commercial gain.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Reddit sues AI company Perplexity and others for 'industrial-scale' scraping of user comments
item.description: Social media platform Reddit sued the artificial intelligence company Perplexity AI and three other entities on Wednesday, alleging their involvement in an “industrial-scale, unlawful” economy to “scrape” the comments of millions of Reddit users for commercial gain.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: OpenAI launches Atlas browser to compete with Google Chrome
item.description: OpenAI introduced its own web browser, Atlas, on Tuesday, putting the ChatGPT maker in direct competition with Google as more internet users rely on artificial intelligence to answer their questions.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Amazon hopes robots can replace 600K future hires: Report
item.description: Amazon hopes robots can replace hundreds of thousands of future roles, according to leaked documents seen by The New York Times.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Modernization with purpose: How federal health agencies can align tech with mission
item.description: Aligning tech, data and workforce to improve health outcomes starts with asking why, Maximus’ Monica Rosser says. The post Modernization with purpose: How federal health agencies can align tech with mission first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Roberts, Federal News Network

item.title: Schiff presses Witkoff on divesting from Trump-tied crypto venture
item.description: Sen. Adam Schiff (D-Calif.) and seven other Senate Democrats pressed U.S. special envoy Steve Witkoff on Wednesday about divesting his stake in World Liberty Financial, the crypto venture launched by the Trump and Witkoff families last year.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Google and Apple face extra UK scrutiny over 'strategic' role in mobile platforms
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain’s antitrust watchdog on Wednesday targeted Google and Apple for their “strategic” roles in mobile ecosystems, opening the door for regulators to impose changes to their business practices to improve competition.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: AI PCs
item.description: Virtually every aspect of technology has been affected, and potentially improved, by artificial intelligence (AI). PCs are no exception. While the meaning of “AI PC” is still evolving, it generally refers to a computer specifically designed to excel at AI-powered tasks.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The best new features in Java 25
item.description: Java continues its fast and feature-packed release schedule, with JDK 25 delivering syntax improvements, simplifications, and performance enhancements. This article looks at the core updates in Java 25, with code and usage examples.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: F5 hack highlights persistent supply chain security concerns
item.description: The F5 breach targets a "foundational technology" relied upon by government agencies and critical infrastructure operators. The post F5 hack highlights persistent supply chain security concerns first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Rude ChatGPT prompts, better answers? What the data says
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman says polite words like "please" and "thank you" cost millions annually, while direct prompts may improve ChatGPT accuracy by several points.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The lost 30 years: The decline of Japan’s semiconductor industry
item.description: Global industrial competition has entered an era in which “whoever controls semiconductors controls the future.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: New military age demands new C2 comms
item.description: As purposely scattered forces replace massing, all units need access to rich and latency-free crucial situational data regardless of from where they operate. The post New military age demands new C2 comms first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Anthropic extends Claude Code to browsers
item.description: Anthropic has launched Claude Code on the web, enabling developers to use the company’s AI coding assistant directly from their browser or smartphone, with no terminal required. Developers can connect a first GitHub repository to Claude Code on the web at claude.com/code.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Visual Studio Code taps AI for merge conflict resolution
item.description: Visual Studio Code 1.105, the latest release of Microsoft’s popular Visual Studio Code editor, introduces several new AI coding features, including the ability to resolve merge conflicts with AI assistance, the ability to resume recent chat sessions, and the ability to install Model Context Protocol
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Big Tech is paying millions to train teachers on AI, in a push to bring chatbots into classrooms
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — On a scorching hot Saturday in San Antonio, dozens of teachers traded a day off for a glimpse of the future. The topic of the day’s workshop: enhancing instruction with artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: JOCELYN GECKER, Associated Press, NewsNation
